summary: Comprehensive testing of ALPHA DROP - Product Intelligence Engine with Google OAuth, beta waitlist, and email notifications completed successfully. All key features working: 1) Login page with Google OAuth and beta signup, 2) Dashboard shows LOGIN button when unauthenticated, 3) Beta signup endpoints working, 4) Auth endpoints properly secured, 5) Pricing page with 3 tiers, 6) Watchlist accessible, 7) Dashboard with real TikTok Shop data (271 products, 86 explosive).

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 30s timeout when calling real TikTok Shop API
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior for real API calls - not a bug

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Get products endpoint with 50 products returned
Dashboard products endpoint with 3 sections
Dashboard stats endpoint showing 271 products, 86 explosive
Product detail endpoint with full analytics
Alerts endpoint with 20 alerts
Categories endpoint with 12 categories
Product filtering by status and score (72+ threshold)
Refresh products endpoint
Alpha Score thresholds working (72+ for EXPLOSIVE)
Subscription plans endpoint with Scout $29, Hunter $79, Predator $199
Watchlist get/add/remove functionality working
Stripe checkout creation working
Cron endpoint security (rejects without API key)
Beta signup endpoint creates waitlist entry with position
Beta stats endpoint returns signup statistics
Auth /me endpoint correctly rejects unauthenticated requests
Auth /session endpoint correctly rejects invalid sessions
Auth /logout endpoint working
Notifications test endpoint correctly requires authentication
Login page loads with Google OAuth button
Beta signup form functional with success state
Beta signup shows waitlist position (#4)
Dashboard shows LOGIN button when not authenticated
LOGIN button correctly navigates to login page
Dashboard loads with real product data (271 products tracked)
Navigation includes all required items (Dashboard, Discover, Watchlist, Alerts, Pricing)
Pricing page displays 3 subscription tiers with correct prices
Pricing page shows detailed features for each plan
Watchlist page accessible with empty state
Watchlist shows proper empty state message
All pages have consistent navigation and branding

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All key features working including login, beta signup, dashboard auth state, pricing, watchlist)
